creator: nospam@ofloo.net
text:
No I reinstalled freebsd10.3 and I had the exact same error, I'll try to install freebsd11 and see what happens, however I'd rather work on helping finding the problem then going around it. When I read your answer on reinstall, I got windows flash backs. where you reboot if something doesn't work and when you think your system is a little slow you just reinstall. But I guess that's just me.

So nothing previous is going on.
